title: Ivy's Noisy Day
synopsis: Little Ivy discovers and counts different sounds throughout her day, from one doorbell to five clapping hands, in this interactive sound adventure for babies.

pages.text: One doorbell goes DING DONG! Ivy hears it ring.

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes standing by a front door. Golden circular waves ripple out from the doorbell in expanding rings of bright yellow and orange light.
illustration.alt: Little girl with dark bob hearing doorbell sounds visualized as golden rings

pages.text: Two dogs go WOOF WOOF! Ivy giggles at the fluffy sounds.

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes watching two dogs. Purple and blue puffy cloud shapes float from each dog's mouth, creating soft rounded sound bubbles.
illustration.alt: Girl with dark hair seeing dog barks as colorful puffy clouds

pages.text: Three cars go BEEP BEEP BEEP! The sounds are bright and sharp.

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes near three cars. Sharp red triangular spikes shoot upward from each car, creating jagged geometric patterns against the sky.
illustration.alt: Little girl observing car beeps as red triangular sound spikes

pages.text: Four birds go TWEET TWEET TWEET TWEET! Ivy looks up at the dancing sounds.

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes gazing upward. Four birds perch above as delicate green and yellow spirals twist and dance in the air like musical ribbons.
illustration.alt: Girl with brown eyes watching bird songs as swirling colored ribbons

pages.text: Five hands go CLAP CLAP CLAP CLAP CLAP! Ivy claps too and watches her own sounds sparkle.

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes clapping her hands. Bright white starbursts and silver sparkles explode from five pairs of clapping hands, creating a celebration of glittering sound fireworks.
illustration.alt: Girl clapping with others, sounds shown as sparkling white starbursts

metadata.illustrationStyle: sound made visible, wavy lines for music, jagged lines for crashes, dots for whispers, synesthesia inspired, seeing sound, color and shape for noise, vibration visual

questions.question: How many dogs did Ivy hear?
questions.explanation: Ivy heard two dogs go WOOF WOOF!

questions.question: What sound did the doorbell make?
